title: patrinia villosa subsp. villosa
intro: Patrinia villosa subsp. villosa, also known as hairy patrinia or hairy shepherd's needle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Patrinia villosa subsp. villosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
